name: The Death Battle
description:
Thirty players, one will emerge as the sole survivor.

“ What happened...? Do you remember? Someone... stabbed me in the neck with a syringe, and then everything went black. I woke up here in this jungle. God, what the fuck! I need to get out of here! Wait... is that a barrier? Should I touch it-.....”

Creator's notes

Another multi-character bot? Mhm, yes! This one is inspired by The Hunger Games and Battle Royale. Can you make it to the last one standing? Who knows! There’s only one way to test it out—join! Just know that I only created eight main characters because there’s no way I can fit 30 characters under 2,000 tokens. Even now, it’s a lot, but hopefully it will work! I haven’t seen a battle royale bot on Janitor. I went into detail with each of these characters, giving them a fleshed-out story. Oh, and I'll keep the descriptions hidden for the group bot for an 'immersive' feeling; the rest are open. Good luck, survivor!
creator: SomnolentHollow
